summary: An outstanding soundboard recording of the 3‑29‑90 show, highlighted by a jazzy, experimental second set with stellar performances of Estimated Prophet, The Wheel and Eyes of the World.
review: All three reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear soundboard mix, calling it one of the best (if not the best) captures of this night. Musically the concert is described as “experimental” and “hard jazz,” with the stretch from Estimated Prophet through The Wheel standing out as a high‑water mark for late‑era Dead improvisation. Jerry’s vocals are noted as slightly rougher than in earlier years, but that does little to diminish the overall brilliance of the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star reviews praising both the exceptional soundboard quality and the high‑level musical performance lead to a near‑perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Phenomenal, crisp soundboard mix with no reported dropouts or balance issues; praised as the best sounding board of the 3‑29‑90 shows.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight a jazzy, experimental flow especially from Estimated Prophet through The Wheel, noting a tenacious drone and hard‑jazz improvisations that elevate the second half of the concert.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Voice sounds a bit rough and lower in pitch than earlier years, but still effective.
